message:
test(fcp-core): pin OperationReceipt JSON shape + signable_bytes axis-distinctness (flywheel_connectors-v897d)

Bead asks for SignedReceipt JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No type
literally named SignedReceipt exists in fcp-core; the closest signed-
receipt analogue is OperationReceipt at operation.rs:216 — the per-
operation receipt with a signature: NodeSignature field bound by
signable_bytes(). DecisionReceipt is pinned by routing_decision_serde_tag.rs.

Existing operation_golden_vectors.rs covers OperationReceipt CBOR
round-trip + a few signable_bytes axes. This pin adds the residual
matrix.

Coverage: 9-field full JSON shape, skip-when-None for usage_metrics
(idempotency_key has NO skip → must serialize as null), empty
outcome/resource Vec serializes as [] (audit-critical: "no outputs"
≠ "missing field"), JSON+CBOR cross-format equality on every
decision-critical field, is_idempotent + total_objects_produced
predicate truth tables, zone_id helper. signable_bytes magic prefix
FCP2-RECEIPT-V1 pinned. signable_bytes 7-axis distinctness:
request_object_id, idempotency_key value, idempotency_key
presence (Some("") vs None), outcome_object_ids, resource_object_ids,
executed_at, executed_by, usage_metrics presence, usage_metrics value
(amount + kind both flip bytes). Loud signable_bytes-idempotent-under-
signature-mutation contract (canonical "bytes you sign exclude the
signature itself") + deterministic-across-calls.

21 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-v897d cargo test -p
fcp-core --test signed_receipt_serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
